{{Quote|Ello, boyos! Yous wantin ta speedaway down ta Roritowns? Or yousa been crunchen?|Rori Space Station hailing a starship|<ref name="SWG:JtL" />}}
The '''Rori Space Station''' or '''Rori Station''' served [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo's]] [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Rori/Legends|Rori]], providing emergency repairs to travelers, and giving clearance for landings on Rori.<ref name="SWG:JtL" />

==Appearances==
